card.name: Ludolf, Out of Touch
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Rock Bottom — You may activate Ludolf's loyalty abilities twice each turn rather than once. [+1]: Each player discards a card. [-2]: Each opponent sacrifices a permanent with the lowest mana value among nonland permanents they control.

card.name: Elissia, Heart in a Headlock // Loose Ends
card.text:
[+1]: Untap up to two lands. You gain 2 life. [-2]: Elissia becomes prepared. Create two 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens with flying.
---
You gain X life and draw X cards.

card.name: Elissia's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Return target nonland permanent you control to its owner's hand. • Tap up to two target creatures. Put a stun counter on a creature tapped this way. • Create a 2/2 blue Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Helenne's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Surveil 2, then draw a card. • Target creature has base power and toughness 0/2 until end of turn. • When target creature you control dies this turn, create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Ludolf's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Ludolf's Charm deals 3 damage to target creature. • Put a menace counter on target creature. It gets +2/+0 until end of turn. • Ludolf's Charm deals 1 damage to each creature and each planeswalker.

card.name: Nimrea's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Nimrea's Charm deals 5 damage to target creature with flying. • Target land you control becomes a 3/3 Elemental creature with trample and haste until end of turn. • Put two +1/+1 counters on target permanent.

card.name: Elwyn's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. You gain 2 life. • Destroy target enchantment. • Up to two target creatures each get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Drevos's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield • Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains lifelink until end of turn. • Target player exiles a creature they control with mana value 2 or less.

card.name: Igrath's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • You may discard a nonland card. If you do, draw two cards. • Switch target creature's power and toughness until end of turn. • Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: Solath's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Mill four cards. You gain 4 life. • Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. • Exile up to three target cards from graveyards.

card.name: Ilyan's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Each creature you control deals 1 damage to target creature you don't control. • Target creature gets +1/+0 and gains flying and first strike until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Aldegar's Charm
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature has base power and toughness 4/4 until end of turn. • Untap target permanent. It gains hexproof until end of turn. • Counter target activated or triggered ability from a nonland source.

card.name: Pale Knight
card.text: Flash Other Spirits you control get +1/+1. Whenever one or more Spirits you control deal combat damage to a player, look at that many cards from the top of your library. You may put one into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Candlevane Arcanist
card.text: {T}, Pay 2 life: Add {U}{B}. Spend this mana only to cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand. Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. (Prepared spells are cast from exile.)

card.name: Ashenreach Raider
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) At the beginning of your end step, if the total power of other creatures you control is above your breakdown, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Evergreen Apex // Manamorphose
card.text:
Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, Evergreen Apex becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Add two mana in any combination of colors. Draw a card.

card.name: Nimrea's Marshal
card.text: Flying Spells you control that target creatures you control cost {1} less to cast. Whenever a creature you control is the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Give It All
card.text: Creatures you control have elation. (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died under your control this turn, create a 2/2 blue Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Galveth Lancer // Levitate
card.text:
Flying When Galveth Lancer enters or attacks, draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card this way, Galveth Lancer becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying and haste until end of turn.

card.name: Thornmere Reaver
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) {X}{X}, {T}, Sacrifice Thornmere Reaver: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. X is equal to your level of breakdown. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Scarlet Crusader
card.text: During your turn, Scarlet Crusader has first strike. Whenever another creature you control dies, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token if it was attacking and not a token. Otherwise, Scarlet Crusader deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Elwyn's Scholar
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't put the card onto the battlefield, put it into your hand.

card.name: Gracehold Soldier
card.text: Flash Flying Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Gracehold Soldier enters, you may tap or untap target creature.

card.name: Galveth Runner // Hear Me Out
card.text:
Galveth Runner can't be blocked by creatures with even mana values. (Zero is even.) Whenever Galveth Runner attacks, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
You draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Make You Bleed
card.text: You may sacrifice a creature. If you do, Make You Bleed deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to any target.

card.name: Embervast Cinderhorn
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Embervast Cinderhorn attacks, add {R}{R}{G}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Bones Stay Strong
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn. Rebound (If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may cast this card from exile without paying its mana cost.)

card.name: Heavenshold Supplicant
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control and you gain 2 life.

card.name: Telomend Spellblade
card.text: Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on Telomend Spellblade. When Telomend Spellblade dies, if its power was 3 or greater, return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Crusher of Crops
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, unravel {6}. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Deathtouch When Crusher of Crops dies, surveil 2.

card.name: Veyran's Champion
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Veyran's Champion enters, create a 3/3 green Zombie Knight creature token.

card.name: Where the Story Goes
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Flashback {4}{GU}{GU} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Goldenmarch Aide
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Goldenmarch Aide enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Seeking Skulker // And Together
card.text:
Seeking Skulker enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) When Seeking Skulker enters, tap target creature.
---
Create a 2/2 blue Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Maddening Shroud
card.text: Enchant creature Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Enchanted creature gets -2/-1. Rock bottom — At the beginning of your upkeep, enchanted creature's controller sacrifices it.

card.name: Galveth Marauder // Shoulder at the Ready
card.text:
Reach Galveth Marauder enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a 5/4 red Ogre creature token with trample.

card.name: Vigil Mourner
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Vigilance Rock bottom — Vigil Mourner gets +3/+0.

card.name: Wandering Sentry
card.text: Whenever Wandering Sentry or another Spirit enters under your control, you may tap target creature.

card.name: Leviathan of the Weave
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) When Leviathan of the Weave enters, surveil 2. Rock bottom — Leviathan of the Weave can't be blocked.

card.name: Corpse Reader
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Galveth Sorcerer
card.text: Reach Discard a card: Draw a card. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Shaper of the Pattern // Growing Roots
card.text:
Deathtouch Shaper of the Pattern enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures.

card.name: Stay a Little Longer
card.text: Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. It can't block this turn. Flashback {1}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Faces in Condensation
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a token Spirit. It also costs {1} less to cast if you control a nontoken Spirit. Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.

card.name: Must Be Dreaming
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Draw two cards. Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Ashenreach Packcaller
card.text: During your turn, Ashenreach Packcaller has first strike. At the beginning of your end step, if you discarded one or more cards this turn, create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token.

card.name: Arcadian Aspirant
card.text: Trample Whenever Arcadian Aspirant becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Arcadian Aspirant, then surveil 1.

card.name: Sacred Guardian
card.text: Flying, vigilance Sacred Guardian gets +2/+0 as long as it's been the target of a spell or ability you control this turn.

card.name: Tides Carry You Back
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Flashback {4}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Duress
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a noncreature, nonland card from it. That player discards that card.

card.name: Paindrunk Pyromancer
card.text: Trample Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Rock bottom — Paindrunk Pyromancer gets +1/+3.

card.name: Telomend Sentinel
card.text: Vigilance When Telomend Sentinel enters or dies, you gain 2 life and surveil 2.

card.name: Iridescent Warden
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Iridescent Warden attacks, other creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Tell Tale Scholar
card.text: Whenever Tell Tale Scholar deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card. Then, discard a card unless you've discarded a card this turn.

card.name: The Dreamer's Decree
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that died under your control this turn. Exile target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Conceited Firestarter
card.text: Menace Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Conceited Firestarter enters, you may sacrifice another artifact or creature. When you do, Conceited Firestarter deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Branching Maze Crawler
card.text: Reach When Branching Maze Crawler enters, return up to one target creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Constant Warden // Honor
card.text:
Vigilance Constant Warden enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Draw a card.

card.name: Drifting Phantasm
card.text: Flying Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Drifting Phantasm enters, draw a card.

card.name: Hunt
card.text: Destroy target creature with mana value less than or equal to the amount of mana spent to cast this spell.

card.name: Blazing Skirmisher
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Blazing Skirmisher enters, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Thornmere Crusher
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Trample, reach Rock bottom — {2}{G}, Exile Thornmere Crusher from your graveyard: Create a 3/3 green Zombie Knight creature token. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Drifting Pathfinder
card.text: Lifelink When Drifting Pathfinder enters, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Adherent of Vraxxis
card.text: Whenever Adherent of Vraxxis attacks, untap target permanent.

card.name: Heavenshold Revenant
card.text: Flying Whenever Heavenshold Revenant attacks, you gain 1 life and surveil 1. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Telomend Channeler
card.text: {T}: Add {R}. When this mana is spent to cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, Telomend Channeler deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Done Dancing
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may unravel {2}. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Choose target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls. Put a +1/+1 counter on the creature you control if this spell's additional cost was paid. Then those creatures fight each other.

card.name: Fall from the Heavens
card.text: Fall from the Heavens deals 4 damage to target attacking, blocking, or tapped creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Flutter
card.text: Choose one – • Target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains hexproof until end of turn. • Target player shuffles up to three target cards from their graveyard into their library.

card.name: Dusk Raider
card.text: Menace Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Dusk Raider enters, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Embervast Defiler
card.text: Menace Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Max speed — Whenever Embervast Defiler attacks, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: Shatter the System
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Give Back in Kind
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if a creature died under your control this turn. When Give Back in Kind enters, exile target nonland permanent until Give Back in Kind leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Telemiscommunications
card.text: Surveil 1, then draw a card. Flashback—{1}{U}, Discard a card. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Corveith Operative // Lose Track
card.text:
Corveith Operative enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target player discards a card.

card.name: Fire from the Heavens
card.text: Fire from the Heavens deals 5 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Arcadian Forager
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, put a +1/+1 counter on Arcadian Forager and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Duty
card.text: Enchant creature Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Enchanted creature gets +2/+0. Rock bottom — You may cast Duty from your graveyard.

card.name: Vertigo of Bliss
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if you've cast another spell this turn. Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Unbound Stalker // Innocent Blood
card.text:
Lifelink Unbound Stalker enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Each player sacrifices a creature.

card.name: Chokehold
card.text: Chokehold costs {1} less to cast if it targets a permanent with mana value 1 or less. Chokehold deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Even in Arcadia
card.text: Search your library for a Forest card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Resist the Violence
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Untap target creature. It gets +1/+0 and gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Conqueror of Nightmares
card.text: Flying Unravel {3}, {T}: Tap target creature. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: High Water Deserter
card.text: Flying Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Rock bottom — High Water Deserter gets +1/+0 and has lifelink.

card.name: Arms Still Swinging
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gets +3/+2 and gains trample and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, destroy target artifact that player controls."

card.name: Coming to the Surface
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature or planeswalker. • Mill four cards. You may put a permanent card from among them into your hand.

card.name: Arcadian Iron Guard
card.text: Begin your Breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Rock bottom — Whenever Arcadian Iron Guard attacks, another target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Unwise Bargain
card.text: Enchant creature Begin your breakdown (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) When Unwise Bargain enters, tap enchanted creature and put two stun counters on it. Rock bottom — Enchanted creature can't become untapped.

card.name: Old Kingdoms Rising
card.text: Create two 1/1 black Cleric creature tokens. If a creature died under your control this turn, create two 2/2 green Wolf creature tokens instead. Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Light Up the Sky
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Exile the top three cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Graneth Intimidator
card.text: When Graneth Intimidator attacks, you may unravel {3}. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Annals Collector
card.text: When Annals Collector enters, choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to two target creatures. • Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Oilskin Colossus
card.text: Ward {3} Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Dream Surgeon
card.text: Deathtouch When Dream Surgeon enters, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Valeshorn Survivor
card.text: Trample Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Valeshorn Survivor.

card.name: Through Death, Action
card.text: Create a 3/3 green Zombie Knight creature token and a 1/1 black Cleric creature token. You gain 2 life. Flashback {5}{G}{G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Melody of Silence
card.text: Flying Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Melody of Silence enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: Sage of the Final Parallel
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand. (Prepared spells are cast from exile.)

card.name: Thornmere Reaper
card.text: Menace Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Thornmere Reaper enters, you may destroy target creature that was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Scarlet Hunt
card.text: Scarlet Hunt 4 damage to target creature. If excess damage is dealt this way, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Goldenmarch Champion
card.text: Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Heavensent Sentinel // Pick Up the Sword
card.text:
Heavensent Sentinel enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn.

card.name: Past Lives Sage // Call to Mind
card.text:
Past Lives Sage enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Graneth Caller
card.text: Menace Unravel {4}: Graneth Caller gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Ignited Mage // Lash Out
card.text:
Haste Ignited Mage enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Lash Out deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Goldenmarch Tender // Bountiful Harvest
card.text:
Vigilance Goldenmarch Tender enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) {T}: Add {G}.
---
You gain 1 life for each land you control.

card.name: It's Good to Be in Love
card.text: Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Tidal Scholar
card.text: Defender Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature. As long as this creature has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, it can attack as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Cold Love, Hot Blood
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, unravel {X}. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Each opponent sacrifices a creature with power X or greater.

card.name: Breaker of Structures
card.text: Once each turn, when you discard a card, you may exile that card from your graveyard. If you do, you may play that card this turn.

card.name: Thornweb Trapper // Tangle Endlessly
card.text:
Deathtouch Exile up to four cards from your graveyard: If there were four or more card types among the exiled cards, Thornweb Trapper becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature, then double the number of +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: Tide Carried Ghost
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Tide Carried Ghost enters, return target artifact or enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Goodnight and Go
card.text: Return up to two target creatures with total mana value 4 or less to their owner's hands.

card.name: Valeshorn Stalwart
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell from anywhere other than your hand, you may pay 2 life. When you do, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: All-Consuming Obsession
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, add {R}. Spend this mana only to cast spells with mana value 5 or greater. Discard a card with mana value 4 or less: Draw a card. Activate only once each turn and as a sorcery.

card.name: Misery's Spiral
card.text: Trample Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Misery's Spiral gets -X/-X, where X is your level of breakdown.

card.name: Stalker of the Evergreens
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Rock bottom — At the beginning of your end step, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token.

card.name: Psychobabble
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller unravels {3}. If they do, create a 2/2 blue Spirit creature token with flying.

card.name: Ashenreach Herald
card.text: Flying {2}{B}, Pay 2 life, Exile Ashenreach Herald from your graveyard: Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature you control. Create a 2/2 blue Spirit creature token with flying. Activate only as a sorcery

card.name: Army of Two
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control. It gains haste and "This creature doesn't untap during your untap step."

card.name: Telomend Whisperer
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, surveil 3. You may put a land card you surveiled this way from your graveyard onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Goldenmarch Soldier
card.text: Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it. When Goldenmarch Soldier dies, you gain life equal to its power.

card.name: Telomend Knight // Brilliant Idea
card.text:
Telomend Knight enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) The second spell you cast each turn costs {2} less to cast.
---
Draw three cards.

card.name: Visceral Rite
card.text: Destroy target creature. Create a 1/1 black Cleric creature token. If the destroyed creature's mana value was 2 or less, create two of those tokens instead.

card.name: Graneth Dragoon // The Way We Move
card.text:
Whenever you attack with two or more creatures, Graneth Dragoon gains flying until end of turn and becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a 1/1 red Soldier creature token. Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Evergreen Hierarch // Consonance
card.text:
{T}: Add {G}. When you spend this mana to cast a permanent spell with mana value 5 or greater, Evergreen Hierarch becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Mill seven cards. For each permanent type, you may put a permanent of that type from among the milled cards onto the battlefield.

card.name: Lovelorn Spirit
card.text: Vigilance Other Spirits you control have vigilance. Sacrifice Lovelorn Spirit: Target Spirit you control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Scholar's Delight
card.text: Search your library for an instant card or a card with flash, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Flashback {5}{U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Past the Edge
card.text: Mill two cards. When you do, you may exile target creature card from your graveyard. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.name: Galveth Cavalier
card.text: Menace At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gets +1/+0 and gains haste and elation until end of turn. (When it deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.)

card.name: Resilience
card.text: Trample When Resilience enters, you gain 5 life. Prevent all combat damage that would be dealt to Resilience.

card.name: Lifeline Devotee // Home
card.text:
At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent controls more lands than you, Lifeline Devotee becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Search your library for a Plains card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Stormy Sea Drake
card.text: Flying Unravel {3}: Stormy Sea Drake phases out. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Dream's Inquisitor
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Dream's Inquisitor enters, target opponent discards a card. {B}, Discard a card: Dream's Inquisitor gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Sear
card.text: Sear deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Lifeline Warden // Propeller Seeds
card.text:
Lifeline Warden enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Whenever Lifeline Warden becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
---
Target creature gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Arcadian Arbiter // Wait It Out
card.text:
Arcadian Arbiter enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Counter target noncreature spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Crystalline Compass
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. This mana can't be spent to cast a spell from your hand. {2}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice Crystalline Compass: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Corveith Reaver // Buried Alive
card.text:
Corveith Reaver power and toughness are each equal to the number of creature cards in your graveyard. Corveith Reaver enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Search your library for up to three creature cards, put them into your graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: Blazing Hussar // Moving Together
card.text:
Haste Blazing Hussar enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a creature card with mana value 2 or less from among them onto the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: Cultivator of the Pattern
card.text: Trample Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, draw a card if it was a creature card. Otherwise, put two +1/+1 counters on Cultivator of the Pattern.

card.name: Prismatic Striker
card.text: Flying Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Prismatic Striker enters, exile up to one target enchantment.

card.name: Bad Body Double
card.text: You may cast this spell as though it had flash if you control a Spirit. You may have Bad Body Double enter as a copy of a creature you control, except it enters tapped with a stun counter on it.

card.name: Hollowed Host // You Will Never Change
card.text:
Hollowed Host enters tapped and prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) When Hollowed Host dies, if it wasn't prepared, return it to the battlefield.
---
Surveil 3. You lose 3 life.

card.name: Empty Road Skirmisher
card.text: Begin your breakdown (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Empty Road Skirmisher can't attack or block unless you control another creature with power greater than your level of breakdown.

card.name: Jaws of Fate
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've cast another spell this turn. Up to two target creatures you control each deal damage equal to their power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Scarlet Avenger // Shine
card.text:
Whenever another creature you control dies, Scarlet Avenger becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Dawnmere Haunt // Consider
card.text:
Flash Flying Dawnmere Haunt enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.

card.name: Candlevane Wraith
card.text: Candlevane Wraith can't block. Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) At the beginning of your end step, you may pay {B} and exile a number of other cards in your graveyard equal to your level of breakdown. If you do, return Candlevane Wraith from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Evergreen Stag
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each instant or sorcery card in your graveyard. Flash Trample Evergreen Stag enters tapped if it's not your turn.

card.name: Crumbling Heart
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 1. Unravel {12}: Crumbling Heart becomes a 8/8 Horror creature in addition to its other types. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each pair of cards pays for {1}. This effect lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Magnanimous Magistrate
card.text: Magnanimous Magistrate enters with five reprieve counters on it. Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, if its mana value was 1 or greater, you may remove that many reprieve counters from Magnanimous Magistrate. If you do, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Pensive Dragoon
Blacklit Revivalist
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature that died under your control this turn. Menace When Blacklit Revivalist enters, return target creature card that was put there from anywhere this turn to your hand.

card.name: Red River Corsair
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Red River Corsair enters, mill a card. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: The Pattern's Gift
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may unravel {4}. If you do, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Target creature gets +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Mouth of Infinity
card.text: Affinity for Spirits (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Spirit you control.) Vigilance When Mouth of Infinity enters, you may exile target nonland permanent if its mana value is X or less, where X is the number of Spirits you control.

card.name: Minds Without Fear
card.text: Choose up to X. X can't be more than one plus the number of creatures you control. • Counter target spell. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. • Target player draws two cards, then discards a card. • Target player shuffles their graveyard into their library.

card.name: Invoker of Vorkath
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create Vorkath, a legendary 6/6 Demon creature token with trample and "At the beginning of combat on your turn, sacrifice a creature. You lose life equal to its toughness." If you already control a legendary Demon, instead create two 1/1 black Cleric creature tokens.

card.name: Arcadian Arcanist
card.text: Haste The first instant or sorcery spell you cast each turn costs {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, create a token that's a copy of Arcadian Arcanist.

card.name: Harmonic Tender // Where I Belong
card.text:
Harmonic Tender enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Harmonic Tender gets +1/+1 for each basic land type among lands you control.
---
Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Neglected Spires Phantom
card.text: Flying Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Neglected Spires Phantom enters, destroy up to one target nonbasic land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Weft Revenant
card.text: Whenever Weft Revenant enters or attacks, surveil 1. You may cast the first Spirit spell you cast each turn by paying {U} and unraveling {X} rather than paying its mana cost, where X is its mana value.

card.name: Silencer of the Dream
card.text: Menace Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Silencer of the Dream enters, each other creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Angry Angel
card.text: Flying, menace Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Angry Angel enters, untap each creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Skittering Behemoth
card.text: Ward—Unravel {3}. (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player unravel 3.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may unravel {3}. If you do, creatures you control gain trample and haste until end of turn. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Fractured Saint
card.text: Fractured Saint's power is equal to the number of creatures you control. Whenever Fractured Saint becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, create a 1/1 black Cleric creature token.

card.name: Telomend Infiltrator // Picture Perfect
card.text:
Ward {2} Whenever one or more creatures you control deals combat damage to a player, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast a copy of it. (You still pay its costs.)

card.name: Dominion's End
card.text: Target opponent chooses a number. When they do, choose one — • Mill that many cards. Then that player sacrifices all but that many permanents. • Return any number of target creature cards with total mana value equal to or less than the chosen number from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Flex on a Full Moon
card.text: Until end of turn, double target creature's power and it gains double strike. Flashback {6}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Total Dominion
card.text: Choose up to X — • Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. • Exile up to two target cards from graveyards. • Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. • Destroy target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Monitoring Orator // Silence
card.text:
Lifelink Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn, Monitoring Orator becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Your opponents can't cast spells this turn.

card.name: Fabricated Ballad // Recurring Dream
card.text:
Flash Flying Whenever Fabricated Ballad attacks, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.

card.name: Splitting Skin
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, unravel {X}. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Splitting Skin deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker. When it dies this turn, you gain life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Unspoken Devotee
card.text: Trample Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature. When Unspoken Devotee dies, you may discard up to X cards, where X is equal to Unspoken Devotee's power. If you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: Viscerath Abomination
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Viscerath Abomination enters, draw cards equal to the greatest power among creatures that died under your control this turn.

card.name: Abandoning Heaven
card.text: Destroy all creatures. {1}{W}{W}{W}, Exile Abandoning Heaven from your graveyard: Each player draws two cards.

card.name: Helenne's Zealot
card.text: Flying Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Rock bottom — Helenne's Zealot gets +2/+1 and has ward {2}.

card.name: Blacklit Harbinger
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) At the beginning of your end step, if an opponent lost more life than your level of breakdown, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed for each opponent that lost life this turn. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Burning Bright
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) When Burning Bright enters, if you cast it, it deals 5 damage to any target and damage to you equal to your level of breakdown. Rock bottom — Creatures you control have haste.

card.name: Sanctuary of the Pattern
card.text: Hexproof You and other permanents you control have hexproof. Whenever Sanctuary of the Pattern attacks, untap up to three target lands you control. They become 3/3 green Elemental creatures.

card.name: Hollow Coronation
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if one or more creatures died under your control this turn, create an X/X black Wraith creature token, where X is the number of creatures that died under your control this turn.

card.name: Clear the Area
card.text: Return each nonland permanent with mana value 2 or less to their owner's hands.

card.name: Blacklit Hierophant
card.text: Flying, trample Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose life equal to the level of your breakdown. Rock bottom — Pay 5 life: Add {B}{B}{B}{B}{B}. Activate only once.

card.name: Ashenreach Hellhound
card.text: Menace Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Ashenreach Hellhound enters, discard your hand, then create three Clue tokens.

card.name: Not Getting Any Better
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Creature spells you cast cost {X} more to cast, where X is your level of breakdown. Whenever you cast a creature spell, copy that spell.

card.name: This Empty Love
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. {2}{W}{U}, Exile This Empty Love from your graveyard: Surveil 3. You gain 3 life. Activate only if you control an Elissia planeswalker.

card.name: What Have You Done to Me?
card.text: Exile target creature you don't control. It's controller may have you create a token that's a copy of it, except it's an enchantment instead of its other types. If they don't, draw two cards.

card.name: Ludolf's Runner
card.text: When Ludolf's Runner enters, target opponent sacrifices target nonland permanent unless they have Ludolf's Runner deal 2 damage to them. Whenever you activate a loyalty ability of a Ludolf planeswalker, you may return Ludolf's Runner from your graveyard to your hand if you haven't returned a card named Ludolf's Runner to your hand this turn.

card.name: The Night Does Not Belong to God
card.text: When The Night Does Not Belong to God enters and whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, exile the top card of your library. As long as you haven't cast a spell this turn, you may play a card exiled with The Night Does Not Belong to God.

card.name: Elwyn of Scale and Leaf
card.text: Lifelink When Elwyn enters, return target nonlegendary card from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, it becomes a 5/5 Dragon with flying in addition to its other types.

card.name: Reclaim the Vessel
card.text: If a permanent entering the battlefield this turn causes an ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time. Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Dreams of Conquering
card.text: {1}{U}{R}: Draw a card, then discard a card. Whenever you discard one or more cards, put that many +1/+1 counters on Dreams of Conquering. Then if there are 5 or more counters on it, you may have it become a 0/0 red Dragon creature with flying.

card.name: Solath, the Hollow
card.text: Whenever Solath, the Hollow enters or attacks, surveil 1. At the beginning of your first main phase, you may unravel {X}{X}. When you do, return target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Veyran, Devoted of Nimrea
card.text: Flying Token creatures you control get +1/+1. Once during each of your turns, when you sacrifice another creature, you may create a token that's a copy of it. Exile that token at the beginning of your next turn's end step.

card.name: Shivery Cocoon // Sleep
card.text:
Flash Shivery Cocoon enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Whenever Shivery Cocoon deals combat damage to a player, put a stun counter on target tapped nonland permanent they control.
---
Tap all creatures target player controls. Those creatures don't untap during that player's next untap step.

card.name: Golden Lodestone
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {6}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice Golden Lodestone: Create a 5/4 red Ogre creature token with trample. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Telomend Archive
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Telomend Archive: Mill two cards, then you may return a card from among them to your hand.

card.name: Evolving Wilds
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Evolving Wilds: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Patient Mariner
card.text: Reach When Patient Mariner dies, surveil 1, then put a +1/+1 counter on up to two target creatures you control. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Embedded Surveyor
card.text: Elation (When this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it to trigger its "enters" ability.) When Embedded Surveyor enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, then shuffle and put that card on top.

card.name: Insatiable Pioneer
card.text: When Insatiable Pioneer enters or attacks, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. Each opponent loses 1 life. {2}, Sacrifice Insatiable Pioneer: Draw a card.

card.name: Overgrown Farmland
card.text: Overgrown Farmland enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Deserted Beach
card.text: Deserted Beach enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Rockfall Valley
card.text: Rockfall Valley enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Shattered Sanctum
card.text: Shattered Sanctum enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Shipwreck Marsh
card.text: Shipwreck Marsh enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Stormcarved Coast
card.text: Stormcarved Coast enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Sundown Pass
card.text: Sundown Pass enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Fracture Point
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Fracture Point: Destroy up to one target nonbasic land. You and that land's controller each creates a tapped Everywhere token. (It's a land with all basic land types.)

card.name: Deathcap Glade
card.text: Deathcap Glade enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Haunted Ridge
card.text: Haunted Ridge enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Dreamroot Cascade
card.text: Dreamroot Cascade enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Dawnmere Crossing
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Unravel {2}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Garden of Stories
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}, {T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.

card.name: Ash Barrens
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Basic landcycling {1} ({1}, Discard this card: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Grief Engine
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Crew X, where X is your level of breakdown.

card.name: Cryptic Prospector // Stage One: Initialize
card.text:
Cryptic Prospector enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) When Cryptic Prospector enters, surveil 1.
---
Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Crystalline Custodian
card.text: Ward {1} Players can't create tokens.

card.name: Cherished Keepsake
card.text: Whenever one or more cards are put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, exile one of them. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Cherished Keepsake: Exile target opponent's graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: The Listening Chair
card.text: When The Listening Chair enters, put a +1/1 counter on each Spirit you control. {W}{U}, Exile a creature card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Activate this ability only once each turn.

card.name: Die Tonight, Live Forever
card.text: As Die Tonight, Live Forever enters, exile each other nonland, nonenchantment permanent you control. Once each turn, you may cast a spell from your hand without paying its mana cost if it's mana value is equal to or less than the number of cards exiled by Die Tonight, Live Forever. At the beginning of your end step, you may cast a card exiled by Die Tonight, Live Forever without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Heartfire Blademaster
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Whenever a player casts a spell, that player loses 1 life. Rock bottom — Spells you cast cost {1} less to cast for each 1 life players have lost this turn.

card.name: Contractor of the Weave
card.text: Ward—Pay 3 life. Trample Whenever Contractor of the Weave enters or you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, put a +1/+1 on Contractor of the Weave and it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Just For Now
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, choose any number. Each mode must choose a different target. • Untap target creature you control. • Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. • Target player that controls a creature with power 4 or greater draws a card. • If all other modes were chosen, target player gains 4 life.

card.name: Heavenshold Martyr
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. Whenever Heavenshold Martyr or another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Cindermark, Heart of Fire // Gift of the Phoenix
card.text:
Flying, haste At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've cast an instant and a sorcery spell this turn, you may discard a card. If you do, return Cindermark, Heart of Fire from your graveyard to the battlefield prepared.
---
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Gift of the Phoenix deals 2 damage to you.

card.name: Contracted Strike
card.text: Destroy target nonbasic permanent.

card.name: Open Warfare
card.text: Creatures you control have lifelink and haste. At the beginning of your second main phase, untap each creature you control. Ahere's an additional combat phase after this phase.

card.name: Tidal Tender // Mind into Matter
card.text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns. At the beginning of your end step, if you didn't play a land this turn, Tidal Tender becomes prepared. This abilities triggers only once. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Draw X cards. Then you may put a permanent card with mana value X or less from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Arcadian Dealer // Missing Piece
card.text:
Whenever a creature you control becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, Arcadian Dealer becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Mill six cards. Return up to two creature cards milled this way with total mana value 6 or less to the battlefield.

card.name: Scholar of the Old Ways
card.text: When Scholar of the Old Ways enters, mill a card. You may play that card this turn. Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to an opponent, you may unravel {X}, where X is that creature's power. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: False Sovereign // Rise
card.text:
False Sovereign enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.) Whenever you sacrifice a creature, False Sovereign becomes prepared.
---
Exile target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard. Create a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Ascensionism
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast for each card you've discarded this turn. Whenever you discard a card, copy it. You may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Path to Eternity
card.text: Exile target permanent. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: From Evergreen Gardens
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, create a Treasure token. Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, target creature you control get +3/+3 and gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Archfiend of the Weave // Lovers Dancing
card.text:
Menace, haste Archfiend of the Weave enters prepared. Whenever Archfiend of the Weave attacks, sacrifice any number of other creatures. Archfiend of the Weave deals damage to any target equal to twice the number of creatures sacrificed this way.
---
Create two 1/1 red Soldier creature tokens.

card.name: Seeker of Nothing // Oblivion Shards
card.text:
At the beginning of your second main phase, Seeker of Nothing becomes prepared if an opponent has three or more cards in hand or controls three or more creatures. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Choose one or more — • Each player loses 2 life. • Each player discards a card. • Each player sacrifices a creature. • Each player sacrifices a land.

card.name: Gracious Future
card.text: Choose one — • Scry 2, then draw a card. • Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. You may choose new targets for the copy. You may cast this spell from your graveyard if you've cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand this turn. If it would be put into a graveyard, exile it.

card.name: Crumbling Legionnaire
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Whenever you attack, if the number of attacking creatures you control is equal to or greater than your level of breakdown, create a 2/1 colorless Scout artifact creature token that's tapped and attacking. Rock bottom — Creatures you control get +1/+0.

card.name: Relentless Arcanist // Don't Stop
card.text:
Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, Relentless Arcanist deals 2 damage to each opponent and it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
Discard up to two cards, then draw that many cards.

card.name: Vraxxis, Between Worlds // Twisted Wish
card.text:
Flying, lifelink At the beginning of your end step, if you have 20 or more life, Vraxxis becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
---
You may put a card you own from outside the game into your hand. You lose half your life, rounded up.

card.name: Igrath of the Weave // New Poetry
card.text:
Indestructible, flying Igrath can't attack or block as long as he is prepared. Whenever Igrath enters or attacks, prepare him.
---
Sacrifice a creature. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Ilyan of the Pattern // Let Go, Just Get In
card.text:
Indestructible, flying Ilyan can't attack or block as long as she is prepared. Whenever Ilyan enters or attacks, prepare them.
---
Choose any number of creatures with different powers. Put a +1/+1 counter on each of them.

card.name: This Stage is a Prison
card.text: Each player exiles the top card of their library until they have exiled cards with total mana value 8 or greater this way then exiles their hand. Starting with you, for each player, one of that player's opponents chooses any number of cards with a total mana value of at least 8 total mana value. That player may cast any number of cards chosen this way without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Helenne, Keeper of Telomend
card.text: Flying Skip your draw step. Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Whenever you play a card, draw a card, then you lose life equal to your level of breakdown.

card.name: Drevos of the Dream // Wake Up
card.text:
Indestructible, flying Drevos can't attack or block as long as he is prepared. Whenever Drevos enters or attacks, prepare him.
---
Each player discards three cards, then draws three cards.

card.name: The Dreamer's Nightmare // Corrupt
card.text:
Menace The Dreamer's Nightmare gets +1/+1 for each Swamp you control. At the beginning of your first main phase, if you have 5 or less life, The Dreamer's Nightmare becomes prepared.
---
Corrupt deals damage to any target equal to the number of Swamps you control. You gain life equal to the damage dealt this way.

card.name: Solath, Vessel Adrift // Perennation
card.text:
Lifelink Behold a God or planeswalker, Discard a card: Solath becomes prepared. Activate only once. (To behold a card, choose a card you control of that type or reveal one from hand.)
---
Return target permanent card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a hexproof counter and an indestructible counter on it.

card.name: Aldegar, Unmoored
card.text: Whenever you activate the loyalty ability of a planeswalker, you may unravel {4}. If you do, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) [+1]: Tap up to one target nonland permanent and put a stun counter on it. It loses all abilities until it untaps. [-3]: Draw three cards. [-8]: Take an extra turn after this one. During that turn, creatures you control are 5/5 Dragons with flying in addition to their other types.

card.name: The Pattern's Gardener
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, unravel {X}. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Trample The Pattern's Gardener enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. When The Pattern's Gardener enters, gain life equal to its power.

card.name: Rider of Blooms
card.text: Trample At the beginning of each end step, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with power X or less, where X is greatest mana value among creatures you control. When Rider of Blooms dies, you may exile it if you control five or fewer lands. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it without this ability.

card.name: Rider of Gales
card.text: Flash Flying At the beginning of each end step, each player draws cards until they have X cards in hand, where X is the greatest mana value among creatures they control. When Rider of Gales dies, you may exile it if you have seven or more cards in hand. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it without this ability.

card.name: Rider of Dawn
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of each end step, if you control fewer creatures than the greatest mana value among creatures you control, create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token. When Rider of Dawn dies, you may exile it if each opponent has more life than you. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it without this ability.

card.name: Arcadian Cavalry
card.text: Flash Flying When Arcadian Cavalry enters, untap each creature you control. Then you may unravel {4}. If you do, creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Rider of Dusk
card.text: Menace At the beginning of each end step, each player chooses up to X creatures they control, then sacrifices the rest, where X is the greatest mana value among creatures they control. When Rider of Dusk dies, you may exile it if you control no creatures. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it without this ability.

card.name: Locked and Caged
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. For as long as it remains exiled, its controller may cast it by unraveling {X} rather than paying its mana cost, where X is its mana value. (While paying an unravel cost, that player can exile cards from their graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Intercept the Arrow of Time
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target spell that wasn't cast from its owner's hand. • Counter target spell if its mana value is greater than the amount of mana spent to cast it.

card.name: Beauty in the Breakdown
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) Draw two cards, then you lose life equal to your level of breakdown.

card.name: Sulfur on Breath
card.text: Sulfur on Breath deals X damage to any target. The next creature spell target player casts this turn costs {X} less to cast.

card.name: Start with a Song
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Blessing of Respite
card.text: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. Flashback {2}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Thirst for Understanding
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard a card that shares a card type with a card in your graveyard.

card.name: Feel Nothing as Well
card.text: Target opponent exiles two cards from their hand. Flashback— {1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Blood and Fury
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, unravel {5}. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.) Blood and Fury deals 5 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Ravager of the Tangle
card.text: Whenever Ravager of the Tangle attacks, you may unravel {5}. If you do, reveal the top card of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (While paying an unravel cost, you can exile cards from your graveyard. Each card pays for {1}.)

card.name: Amulet of Dreams
card.text: Begin your breakdown. (It begins at 4 and decreases by 1 on each of your turns when the second card is put into your graveyard that turn. You reach rock bottom at 0.) {T}: Add {C}. Rock bottom — {4}, {T}: Create a 2/2 green Wolf creature token. It can't block this turn.

card.name: Nimrea, Sovereign of Arcadia
card.text: Flying, lifelink, haste Nimrea, Sovereign of Arcadia has all prepared spells of other permanents you control. (Even if they aren't prepared.) Whenever Nimrea deals combat damage to player or planeswalker, she becomes prepared. (While she's prepared, you may cast a copy of any of her spells. Doing so unprepares her.)

card.name: Canvas of Sound
card.text: Whenever you cast your first instant or sorcery spell from your hand each turn, exile an instant or sorcery card at random from your graveyard as one of Canvas of Sound's prepared spells. Then Canvas of Sound becomes prepared. (While she's prepared, you may cast a copy of any of her prepared spells. Doing so unprepares her.)

card.name: Treasure TBC
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Everywhere TBC
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest. ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.)

card.name: Demon TBC
card.text: Trample

card.name: Zombie TBC
card.text: Decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Ogre TBC
card.text: Trample

card.name: Clue TBC
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.

card.name: Spirit TBC
card.text: Flying

card.name: Spirit TBC
card.text: Flying

card.name: Rider of Passion
card.text: Haste At the beginning of each end step, Rider of Passion deals 2 damage to each player who controls a number of creatures less than the greatest mana value among creatures they control. When Rider of Passion dies, you may exile it if an opponent has 15 or more life. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it without this ability.

card.name: Breakdown TBC
card.text: Whenever the second card is put into your graveyard on each of your turns, if your breakdown is at 4 or less, decrease your breakdown by 1. You reach rock bottom at 0. This ability triggers only once each turn.
